title: Gynaecology Department at UHDC Dehradun
description: The Gynaecology Department at UHDC Dehradun provides comprehensive care for women's health conditions. Our team of experienced specialists offers a wide range of diagnostic and treatment options, ensuring the best possible outcomes for our patients.

content.overview: The Department of Obstetrics & Gynaecology at Uttaranchal Hospital & Diagnostic Centre (UHDC), Dehradun provides comprehensive healthcare services for women at every stage of life. The department is supported by experienced consultants, skilled nursing staff, and modern medical infrastructure to ensure safe, effective, and compassionate care.We offer a wide range of services, including antenatal and postnatal care, high-risk pregnancy management, infertility evaluation, management of menstrual and hormonal disorders, and advanced gynaecological surgeries. The department is equipped with modern labour rooms, well-established Operation Theatres (OT), and neonatal support facilities to manage both routine and emergency cases efficiently.Our approach is based on evidence-based allopathic practices, focusing on patient safety, early diagnosis, personalized treatment, and holistic care. We are committed to delivering ethical, compassionate, and high-quality healthcare to ensure the well-being of every woman.

faq.question: What services are commonly discussed in this department?
faq.answer: The department focuses on women’s health concerns, consultation, assessment, and treatment planning based on the patient’s needs.

faq.question: Is this department suitable for routine checkups?
faq.answer: Yes. Routine visits are useful for preventive care, ongoing monitoring, and early support when concerns arise.

faq.question: When should I visit the department?
faq.answer: You should visit whenever you need a specialist consultation, symptom review, or a structured treatment recommendation.
